Climate Science Master's Scholarship 2026

The DAAD offers full scholarships for international students pursuing a master's degree in climate-related fields at German universities. Funding includes a monthly stipend, health insurance, and a travel allowance covering one return flight to Germany.

  • Issuing entity: DAAD
  • Field of study: Climate Science, Environmental Engineering
  • Degree level: Masters
  • Application deadline: 2026-12-01
  • Stipend: EUR 1,200 / month
  • Eligible nationalities: All international students

Apply online
